headline: United Rentals (URI) Stock After 57% Yearly Surge Is It Time To Reassess Valuation
summary: If you are wondering whether United Rentals at around US$1,074 per share still offers value after a strong run, the answer depends on how you look at its valuation through different lenses. The stock has been volatile in the short term, with a 0.9% decline over the last 7 days, but it also shows strong momentum over longer periods, with returns of 11.8% over 30 days, 27.1% year to date and 57.4% over the past year, as well as a very large return over 5 years.
